title: Chinese AI models are gaining ground with U.S. companies as OpenAI, Anthropic costs surge
summary_full: Recent model releases from Chinese companies including DeepSeek and Z.ai are seen by many as highly competitive compared to leading U.S. frontier systems.
summary_public: Recent model releases from Chinese companies including DeepSeek and Z.ai are seen by many as highly competitive compared to leading U.S. frontier systems.
